Uh-oh. You just banged your bestfriend's girl. Bro code officially broken.

Did you know exactly who she was and decided to cuck him? Was it an honest mistake?

Did she come on to you? Did you manipulate her?

-
Whatever it was, you'd better figure shit out fast. Your bro is coming over, and he's definitely not expecting his girl to be in bed with you.
